description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomous mode was proceeding straight through the intersection of Mason St. and Ellis St. when it was rear-ended by 
a passenger vehicle that was switching lanes and made contact with the Zoox vehicle's sensors. The other party left the scene. The police 
were not called, and there were no injuries.
Print
Clear Form
